exemplar.title: How might the context in which knowledge is presented influence whether it is accepted or rejected?

detailedExemplarData.title: How might the context in which knowledge is presented influence whether it is accepted or rejected?

strengths: Three specific, real-world objects are clearly identified with precise provenance
Each object is explicitly and consistently linked to the chosen IA prompt
Commentary is well supported by appropriate evidence, statistics, and quotations
The conclusion synthesizes how different contexts shape acceptance or rejection of knowledge
weaknesses: Analytical depth is uneven, with some assertions left unexamined
Occasional narrative description slips in instead of sustained critical analysis
Limited explicit engagement with TOK concepts (ways of knowing, knowledge frameworks)
Counter-perspectives are only briefly acknowledged rather than fully explored
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The official examiner awarded a total of 8 marks, placing the work solidly in the 7â8 band. The exhibition excels in selecting three clear, context-rich objects and providing strong, evidence-based links to prompt 24, demonstrating how context influences knowledge acceptance. However, minor lapses in analytical depth, occasional reliance on description, and limited explicit TOK concept engagement prevent it from reaching the top (9â10) band. The score of 8 accurately reflects these strengths and limitations, aligning with the examinerâs holistic judgment.

annotations.comment: The prompt is clearly and prominently stated, which effectively anchors the exhibitionâs focus and ensures the IA prompt is evident throughout.
Consider adding a brief introduction after the word count to outline the chosen IA prompt and the three selected objects, guiding the reader through your exhibitionâs structure.
The acknowledgement of potential rejection by some audiences is a valuable nuance; consider providing a concrete example or data to illustrate this.
Including the risk of manipulation shows good understanding of counter-perspectives, adding balance to the argument.
It would strengthen the analysis to explicitly state the years covered by the Pew graph within the text to situate the data temporally.
What specific aspects of the context in TOK Prompt 24 will you emphasize in your analysis? Clarifying this could sharpen the exhibitionâs focus.
The provenance of Greenpeaceâs video is well defined, providing clear real-world context for this object.
The analysis mentions emotional engagement but could further explore how this relates to specific ways of knowing such as emotion versus reason in TOK.
The assertion that the visual bypasses rational skepticism is intriguing but needs deeper examination of underlying cognitive processes, perhaps referencing TOK theories.
Using generational statistics (70% vs 31%) effectively demonstrates how context influences acceptance of knowledge.
You might consider comparing this example to another historical expulsion to illustrate how context shapes reception of knowledge more broadly.
Referencing Gordon Allportâs findings adds academic weight, but specifying the studyâs publication year and title would improve the evidenceâs credibility.
Connecting the discussion to TOK concepts such as culture and language as ways of knowing could deepen the exhibitionâs theoretical engagement.
Consider including a counter-example, such as conservative opposition groups, to demonstrate knowledge rejection and add balance to the argument.
The conclusion nicely synthesizes how different contextsâgenerational, social, educationalâinfluence knowledge acceptance.
Personal connection (parents affected) enriches the exhibition by providing firsthand context and authenticity.
The discussion could be enhanced by analyzing Idi Aminâs rhetorical devices (e.g., fear appeals, repetition) to show how language features influenced acceptance.
Integrating TOK concepts such as authority or power dynamics in knowledge dissemination would deepen the analytical lens.
The description of societal hatred towards colonizers is detailed but could tie into knowledge frameworks like shared belief systems.
Incorporating the economic statistics on business and tax control effectively grounds the analysis in concrete context.
The bibliography demonstrates thorough research with diverse sources, including primary materials.
Bibliographic entries should follow a consistent citation style (e.g., APA or MLA) to improve professionalism and clarity.
Some URLs appear incomplete or contain typos (for instance, 'iournals' in the Cambridge entry); ensure all links are accurate and properly formatted.
Including access dates for online sources would strengthen the rigor of your citations.
Consistent formatting of author names (e.g., 'Peterson, Derek R.' vs âProfessor...â) will improve bibliographic clarity.
The inclusion of the primary speech transcript from Archives New Zealand enhances the exhibitionâs authenticity and depth.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
